corrections.current: οὐκ ἀδυνατῶν ἐν παρατάξει ἀσεβεῖς δικαίοις ὑποχειρίους δοῦναι,
corrections.correct: οὐκ ἀδυνατῶν ἐν παρατάξει ἀσεβεῖς ὑποχειρίους δοῦναι,
corrections.note: The left-margin line number 9 has been mistakenly transcribed as the word δικαίοις in the body; the printed text reads ἀσεβεῖς ὑποχειρίους δοῦναι.

corrections.current: οὐκ ἀγνοῶν ὅτι πονηρὰ ἡ γένεσις αὐτῶν
corrections.correct: οὐκ ἀγνοῶν ὅτι πονηρὰ ἦ γένεσις αὐτῶν
corrections.note: Printed text has ἦ, not ἡ.

corrections.current: τίς δὲ ἐγκαλέσει σοι κατὰ ἐθνῶν ἀπολωλότων, ἃ σὺ ἐποίησας;
corrections.correct: τίς δὲ ἐγκαλέσει σοι κατὰ ἐθνῶν ἀπολωλότων, ἃς σὺ ἐποίησας;
corrections.note: Relative pronoun is feminine plural ἃς in the print.
After the parenthesis the sigla are printed as separate ℵA C, with C distinct, not fused as ℵAC.
The witness after the bracket is Bᵃ, not B*.
Initial epsilon is missing in ἐαν.
Printed apparatus reads om η, not ση η.
The apparatus includes om before δουναι.
Witness is ℵ*, not plain ℵ.

corrections.current:
κολασθηναι (pr λ ℵ** improb
ex¹, postea ras)]
corrections.correct:
κολασθηναι (pr λ ℵ* improb
ex¹, postea ras)]
corrections.note: The printed siglum appears to be ℵ*, not ℵ**.

uncertain.location: APPARATUS line 5, first variant after θιασου
uncertain.note: The exact sigla and spacing around '(θειασου)] ℵA C' are slightly cramped; correction supplied with medium confidence.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but one body word appears to be a captured marginal line number and two textual errors are present. Apparatus has several clear misreadings, especially om/initial letters and sigla.
